title: Milford Collection Scented Pine Cones - Winter Spice 2 x Bags 500g
features: Scented Pine Cones Winter Spice Set 2 Bags
Each Bag Weight approx 500g (minimum) 1000g in Total
Packaged in a decorative red organza bag to make a great gift
description: Product description Scented Pine Cones Winter Spice Set 2 Bags Natural Pine Cones generously scented with high quality luxurious cinnamon and clove fragrance oil and finished off in a red organza bag. Pine Cone vary in sizes inside the bag You will receive 2 x Bags 500g Scented Pine Cones 1000g in Total Safety Warning CAUTION: This product contains natural pine cones and fragrance oils that may cause allergic reactions in some individuals. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. Do not use to repel pests. If the bag is punctured or torn, it may pose a choking hazard. Dispose of responsibly in accordance with local regulations.
